completed_tasks.name: Optimize gallery WebP (1600px, q75): 87 MB → 36 MB
Remove leftover tmp file from gallery optimization
Build and prepare dist.zip for deploy

remaining_tasks.name: Manual deploy: upload dist.zip and run deploy.php

blockers.description: No FTP/SSH password available in this environment; SSH key was rejected by hostiman server.
blockers.workaround: User will upload dist.zip manually and call deploy.php.

human_actions_pending.action: Upload f:\VIBECODING\SUNLIFE\sunlife\dist.zip to sunlife-photo.ru root via FTP, then open https://sunlife-photo.ru/deploy.php?key=sunlife2025deploy
human_actions_pending.context: dist.zip is 481 KB and contains dist/ folder with all built files except images/gallery (already on server).

decisions.decision: Exclude images/gallery from dist.zip for this deploy.
decisions.rationale: Gallery files are already on the server and were only optimized, not renamed. Including them would make the archive ~47 MB and slow FTP upload unnecessarily.

decisions.decision: Delete original JPG/PNG files that have WebP equivalents.
decisions.rationale: All code references use WebP versions; originals were unused and consumed ~50 MB in the repo.

decisions.decision: Resize gallery images to 1600px on the long edge and encode at WebP quality 75.
decisions.rationale: Reduced gallery from 87 MB to 36 MB with acceptable visual quality; large originals are not needed for web display.

next_action: Wait for user to complete manual deploy, then verify https://sunlife-photo.ru/ loads correctly and toast/back-to-top/skeletons work.
context_notes: todo-010 is complete and pushed to GitHub. The build is clean (no lint/TS errors). dist.zip is ready. The only remaining step is human-driven deployment because credentials are not available. After deploy, the next todos are todo-004 (Vercel) and todo-005 (analytics), but todo-011 (privacy policy) may be more urgent depending on legal requirements.
